title: zeia occidentalis
intro: Zeia occidentalis, also known as Wild Licorice or American Licorice, is a perennial plant native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Zeia occidentalis include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as digestive issues like indigestion and nausea. Zeia occidentalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or syrup, and is often used to soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues.
